mapper.insert: insert into guestbook_messages (nickname, email, content, status, pinned, ip, user_agent) values (#{nickname}, #{email}, #{content}, 'pending', false, #{ip}, #{userAgent})
mapper.select: select count(*) from guestbook_messages where deleted = false and status = 'approved'
select * from guestbook_messages where deleted = false and status = 'approved' order by pinned desc, created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select * from guestbook_messages
order by pinned desc, created_at desc, id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update guestbook_messages set status = #{status}, admin_note = #{adminNote}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted = false
update guestbook_messages set pinned = #{pinned}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted = false
mapper.select: select * from guestbook_messages where id = #{id} and deleted = false
